# Behavior and Code of Conduct

1) Do not use slurs, swears, or other explicitly harmful/rude words, images, icons, etc.
2) Do not remove, destroy, or stop anyone's work without permission from said person. The only exception to this is if a feature is changed which overwrites previous work done or work that is currently in progress.
3) Do not attempt to write, push, contribute, or deploy malicious software whether or not you know if it is malicious. Take responsibility for testing everything that you write, contribute, push, or deploy as any damages will be your responsibility.
4) Be respectful
5) No politics, unless it is a constructive talk about the history of space technologies. If talking about present or future technologies, please try to leave politics out of the discussion as much as possible, and keep it respectful.
6) Have fun

All of the above rulse MUST be followed to be allowed to contribute to this project.
